Showcase Theme

A modern portfolio with clarity and polish.

Typography-forward layouts, accessible navigation, and a clean project grid—built as a classic WordPress theme.

View Work Contact
  • Card-based project grid
  • High-contrast, generous spacing
  • Subtle motion (reduced-motion respected)

Tip: assign a Primary Menu for full control.

Featured Work

Projects that read clean and feel premium.

In WordPress, this grid pulls from your latest posts. Add featured images for extra polish.

About

A clean, modern foundation—ready for your work.

Use this theme for a portfolio, studio, or small business site. It’s built for clarity: strong type, thoughtful spacing, and predictable components.

  • Accessible skip link + focus styles
  • Mobile-first navigation toggle
  • Cards and typography scale cleanly

What to customize

  1. Set your homepageSettings → Reading for a static front page.
  2. Assign a menuAppearance → Menus → Primary Menu.
  3. Add featured imagesCards look best with thumbnails.

Send a quick note and we’ll reply with next steps.
